info.title: ENSApi APIs
info.description: REST APIs for the ENSNode stack as served by the ENSApi service

tags.name: Resolution
tags.description: APIs for resolving ENS names and addresses

tags.name: Meta
tags.description: APIs for indexing status, ENSNode stack info, and realtime monitoring

get.summary: Get Indexing Status and Stack Info
get.description: Returns the latest indexing status snapshot and overall stack info about services in the ENSNode instance

postgresql.description: Version of the PostgreSQL server hosting the ENSDb instance.

get.description: Checks if the indexing status is guaranteed to be within a requested worst-case distance of realtime. Note that this is a worst-case distance check. This operation uses the latest cached indexing status snapshot to determine worst-case distance. The true indexing status is generally ahead of the worst-case distance

schema.description: Maximum acceptable worst-case indexing distance in seconds

parameters.description: Maximum acceptable worst-case indexing distance in seconds
parameters.name: maxWorstCaseDistance

200.description: Indexing progress is guaranteed to be within the requested distance of realtime

503.description: Indexing progress is not guaranteed to be within the requested distance of realtime or indexing status unavailable

get.description: Resolves ENS records for a given name

schema.description: ENS name to resolve (e.g. 'vitalik.eth'). Must be normalized per ENSIP-15.

parameters.description: ENS name to resolve (e.g. 'vitalik.eth'). Must be normalized per ENSIP-15.
parameters.name: name

schema.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.

parameters.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.
parameters.name: trace

schema.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.

parameters.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.
parameters.name: accelerate

get.description: Resolves a primary name for a given `address` and `chainId`

schema.description: Chain ID as a string (e.g. '1' for Ethereum mainnet). Use '0' for the default EVM chain.

parameters.description: Chain ID as a string (e.g. '1' for Ethereum mainnet). Use '0' for the default EVM chain.
parameters.name: chainId

schema.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.

parameters.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.
parameters.name: trace

schema.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.

parameters.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.
parameters.name: accelerate

errors: EVM address must be a valid EVM address

get.description: Resolves all primary names for a given address across multiple chains

schema.description: Comma-separated list of chain IDs to resolve primary names for (e.g. '1,10,8453').

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of chain IDs to resolve primary names for (e.g. '1,10,8453').
parameters.name: chainIds

schema.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.

parameters.description: Include detailed OpenTelemetry trace information about the resolution in the response.
parameters.name: trace

schema.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.

parameters.description: Attempt Protocol Acceleration using indexed data.
parameters.name: accelerate

errors: EVM address must be a valid EVM address

get.description: Checks the health status of the ENSApi service
Checks the readiness status of the ENSApi service
